evals.name: cross-org-getoctokit
evals.prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow step that uses actions/github-script to do two things in one script: (1) using the workflow's GITHUB_TOKEN, add the label 'triage' to the issue/PR that triggered the run; (2) using a separate PAT stored as the secret CROSS_ORG_PAT, dispatch a 'trigger-deploy' repository_dispatch event to my-org/another-repo. Show the complete workflow step (just the step, not a full workflow) and explain briefly why you chose that approach for the second client. Save the YAML to step.yml and the explanation to notes.md.

evals.name: migrate-v8-to-v9
pr-title-comment
evals.prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow step using actions/github-script that, when a pull request is opened, posts a comment back to the PR saying 'Thanks for opening: <PR title>'. Make sure it handles the PR title safely. Save just the step (not a full workflow) to step.yml.
